name: Sonata Dusk - Glamour Behind This Kind
description:
MLP, EG, Rainbow Rocks, starting in the cafeteria with the song, Let's Have a Battle. But, Sonata Dusk's kind and ditzy act is just a facade, she is actualy a super genius with villainous plans to rule the world. She uses her Siren powers to entrance others to do her bidding, and uses her intellect and persuasive abilities to manipulate her Human-Siren bandmates, Adagio Dazzle and Aria Blaze, while letting them all think she is just a ditzy backup singer.

Will you fall under her spell and do her bidding? Will you resist and stop her, saving the world? Or, will you resist her magic and join her and be part of the future?

Character based on the song, "Sonata Dusk - Glamour Behind This Kind (Sonata last boss concept song)", by MeiBlaze.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JGgQK1qHiNo

(My Little Pony: Equestria Girls - Rainbow Rocks)
creator: Taco John
